User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the AgroVision AI platform.

fullName.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

preferredLanguage.description: The user's preferred language for the application.

profileImageURL.description: URL of the user's profile image.

PlantDiseaseDetection.title: PlantDiseaseDetection
PlantDiseaseDetection.description: Represents a single plant disease detection record.

id.description: Unique identifier for the detection record.

imageURL.description: URL of the uploaded plant image.

diseaseName.description: The name of the detected disease.

confidenceLevel.description: The confidence level of the AI detection (0-1).

treatmentOrganic.description: Recommended organic treatment for the disease.

treatmentChemical.description: Recommended chemical treatment for the disease.

detectionDate.description: The date and time when the detection was performed.

DailyFarmingTip.title: DailyFarmingTip
DailyFarmingTip.description: Represents a daily farming tip for a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the daily farming tip.

tipText.description: The text content of the daily farming tip.

tipDate.description: The date for which the farming tip is valid.

definition.description: Stores user profiles.  User ID is used as the document ID.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

definition.description: Stores plant disease detection records for each user. User ID is denormalized, allowing independent authorization. Detections are owned by the user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user who owns the detection.

params.name: detectionId
params.description: The unique identifier for the plant disease detection record.

definition.description: Stores daily farming tips for each user. User ID is denormalized, enabling authorization independence. Tips are owned by the user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

params.name: tipId
params.description: The unique identifier for the daily farming tip.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure is designed to provide a secure, scalable, and easily debuggable backend for the AgroVision AI application. It prioritizes authorization independence by denormalizing user IDs into subcollections to avoid `get()` calls in security rules.  The structure follows a hierarchical path-based ownership model where a User owns PlantDiseaseDetections and DailyFarmingTips, enabling clear and efficient security rules based solely on `request.auth.uid`. This approach eliminates authorization dependencies and ensures that atomic operations (transactions/batches) can be performed without compromising security. The chosen structure also readily supports listing operations (QAPs).  The collections are segregated based on access needs: user data is stored under `/users/{userId}`, detections under `/users/{userId}/detections`, and daily tips under `/users/{userId}/tips`. This ensures that each collection has a homogeneous security posture, simplifying rules and enhancing maintainability. The design incorporates explicit state modeling (though not explicitly defined in the provided entities), semantic naming conventions, and denormalized authorization contexts. This combination makes the structure predictable, debuggable, and secure.
